title: XVN.
description: A new way to enjoy Minecraft, mixed with support for PvP Players, various other activities, while gaining a performance increase up too 750%+! (HARDWARE DEPENDENT.)
body:
# XVN.

This modpack is built for one thing: maximum FPS without sacrificing gameplay. Expect **up to 750%+ FPS improvements** depending on your setup, all while staying smooth, responsive, and PvP-ready.



> Every mod is carefully selected and configured to reduce overhead, improve rendering efficiency, and minimize input lag. No bloat. No gimmicks. Just performance.



⚠ WARNING: 
<details>
<summary>Vulkanmod</summary>

> Includes **VulkanMod** (experimental & picky). There is a **high chance of crashes**, so dont believe it 100% that its gonna work first try, check out their Github for incompatibilities and other stuff

https://github.com/xCollateral/VulkanMod

</details>





## Key features


• **Massive** FPS **Boost**.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

> Advanced rendering, memory tweaks, and engine-level improvements for dramatically higher frame rates.

</details>

• **Less** input **latency**.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
  
> Optimized for mouse & keyboard responsiveness — ideal for PvP.

</details>

• **Smoother** experience.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
  
> Faster chunk loading, reduced stuttering, and consistent frame pacing.

</details>

• Mods for **other daily tasks**.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
  
> Quality-of-life improvements for competitive play without adding bloat.

</details>

• Not making the game **look worse for performance**.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
  
> Clean, sharp look without heavy graphical overhead.

</details>



## Rare/Intersting picks ive made.


> This pack also includes some uncommon but powerful mods you don’t see everywhere:  

• **VulkanMod** – experimental Vulkan renderer (FPS monster, but crash-prone)  
• **Bad Optimizations.** – like its description says, aton of micro-optimizations that end up doing a bigger change. 


## Kind of people i made this for.


- PvP & competitive players wanting max performance without drops that sodium or other packs might have. 
- Low-end PCs needing serious optimization ( ⚠ must be new enough to support it. ⚠ ) 
- High-end PCs looking for new peaks while enjoying their experience.
- Anyone who wants Minecraft to max out.

# Big notes!

- Gains vary by hardware, previous mods, and settings.  
- Allocate RAM reasonably; avoid over-allocation.  
- Use updated GPU drivers.  
- Additional heavy mods may reduce stability.  

> - ### ![Average World FPS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tv8P0AUb/images/b163961e2a8f18f4fd88e9689727487c62d67b4f.png)



> Not just another FPS boost pack — a carefully tuned performance build focusing on competitive play, responsiveness, and extreme optimization. Load it up and feel the difference immediately.

## Incase you are not in the wanting of troubleshooting.

- **You should try Alternatives to Vulkan modpacks or modpacks like Fabulously Optimized.**
- **BUT BEWARE OF A POSSIBLE DECREASE OF PERFORMANCE OF WHAT YOU COULD ACHIEVE WITH THIS.**

> I have only tested this on my own hardware, which you can see some of it in the given screenshots.
